From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Football league season

[Divizia B](/wiki/Divizia_B "Divizia B")

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Season | 1997–98 |
| Country | [Romania](/wiki/Romania "Romania") |
| Teams | 36 (2x18) |
| Promoted | [Astra Ploiești](/wiki/FC_Astra_Giurgiu "FC Astra Giurgiu") [Olimpia Satu Mare](/wiki/FC_Olimpia_Satu_Mare "FC Olimpia Satu Mare") [FC Onești](/wiki/FCM_Dinamo_One%C8%99ti "FCM Dinamo Onești") |
| Relegated | [Metalul Plopeni](/wiki/CSO_Plopeni "CSO Plopeni") [CFR Cluj](/wiki/CFR_Cluj "CFR Cluj") [Dunărea Călărași](/wiki/FC_Dun%C4%83rea_C%C4%83l%C4%83ra%C8%99i "FC Dunărea Călărași") [UM Timișoara](/wiki/CSP_UM_Timi%C8%99oara "CSP UM Timișoara") [Foresta II Fălticeni](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni") [Gloria Reșița](/wiki/Gloria_Re%C8%99i%C8%9Ba "Gloria Reșița") |
| Top goalscorer | [Daniel Bona](/wiki/Daniel_Bona "Daniel Bona") (16 goals) |
| ← [1996–97](/wiki/1996%E2%80%9397_Divizia_B "1996–97 Divizia B")  [1998–99](/wiki/1998%E2%80%9399_Divizia_B "1998–99 Divizia B") → | |

The **1997–98 Divizia B** was the 58th season of the second tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").

The format has been maintained to two series, each of them having 18 teams. At the end of the season, the winners of the series promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") and the last three places from both series relegated to [Divizia C](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III"). A promotion play-off was played between the runners-up of the series to decide the third team that promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1997%E2%80%9398_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Danubiana Ploiești* was renamed as [Astra Ploiești](/wiki/FC_Astra_Giurgiu "FC Astra Giurgiu").

[Bucovina Suceava](/wiki/CSM_Suceava "CSM Suceava") merged with *Foresta Fălticeni*, became the second squad of Foresta and was renamed as [Foresta II Fălticeni](/wiki/Foresta_F%C4%83lticeni "Foresta Fălticeni").

Updated to match(es) played on 30 June 1998. Source: [romaniansoccer.ro](http://www.romaniansoccer.ro/divizia_b/tables/1997_98.shtml) (in Romanian)  
Rules for classification: 1) Points; 2) Head-to-head points; 3) Head-to-head goal difference; 4) Head-to-head goals scored; 5) Head-to-head away goals scored; 6) Goal difference; 7) Goals scored.  
(C) Champions; (P) Promoted; (R) Relegated

## Promotion play-off

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1997%E2%80%9398_Divizia_B&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Promotion play-off")]

The 2nd-placed teams of the Divizia B played a match to decide the third team promoted to [Divizia A](/wiki/1998%E2%80%9399_Divizia_A "1998–99 Divizia A"). The match was played on neutral ground, on the [Nitramonia Stadium](/w/index.php?title=Park_Arena&action=edit&redlink=1 "Park Arena (page does not exist)") in [Făgăraș](/wiki/F%C4%83g%C4%83ra%C8%99 "Făgăraș"), [Brașov County](/wiki/Bra%C8%99ov_County "Brașov County").

[FC Onești](/wiki/FCM_Dinamo_One%C8%99ti "FCM Dinamo Onești") v **[Electroputere Craiova](/wiki/FC_Caracal_(2004) "FC Caracal (2004)")**

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 30 May 1998 | **[FC Onești](/wiki/FCM_Dinamo_One%C8%99ti "FCM Dinamo Onești")** | **2–1 ([a.e.t.](/wiki/Extra_time_(association_football) "Extra time (association football)"))** | [Electroputere Craiova](/wiki/FC_Caracal_(2004) "FC Caracal (2004)") | [Făgăraș](/wiki/F%C4%83g%C4%83ra%C8%99 "Făgăraș") |
| 14:00 [EEST](/wiki/Eastern_European_Summer_Time "Eastern European Summer Time") ([UTC+3](/wiki/UTC%2B03:00 "UTC+03:00")) | [Bîrsan](/w/index.php?title=Costel_B%C3%AErsan&action=edit&redlink=1 "Costel Bîrsan (page does not exist)")  80' [Iriza](/w/index.php?title=Ionel_Iriza&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ionel Iriza (page does not exist)") gold-colored soccer ball 95' | [Report](https://www.ziaruldeiasi.ro/sport/un-gol-de-aur-cit-un-campionat~nic4s) | [Șoavă](/wiki/Florin_%C8%98oav%C4%83 "Florin Șoavă")  61' | Stadium: [Nitramonia](/w/index.php?title=Park_Arena&action=edit&redlink=1 "Park Arena (page does not exist)") Attendance: 4,500 Referee: Marcel Lică ([Constanța](/wiki/Constan%C8%9Ba "Constanța")) |
